# PetGadgetHub

> Problem-first guides to pet technology for real pet owners. Independent editorial. Transparent Amazon affiliate disclosures on every page.

## What this site is

PetGadgetHub is a small, editorially independent affiliate review site focused on practical pet gadgets: water fountains, GPS trackers, smart cameras, automatic feeders, and everyday walk gear. Every recommendation starts with a real problem, not a product spec sheet.

## Editorial approach

- We describe the problem before mentioning any product.
- We include an honest note on each product page where limitations matter.
- Prices are not displayed on product cards because they change. We link directly to Amazon for live pricing.
- All outbound product links are Amazon affiliate links (tags: petgadgethu06-20 for US/CA, petgadgethub9-21 for UK). This is disclosed in a sticky banner on every page.

## Products currently covered

- Petlibro Stainless Steel Pet Fountain (hydration, ASIN B09ZXS6D4Y)
- Pet N Pet Biodegradable Poop Bags (daily walks, ASIN B01H3Y9M96)
- Kasa Smart Pet Camera (home monitoring, ASIN B08GS1D684)
- ChomChom Pet Hair Remover (grooming and home, ASIN B00BAGTNAQ)
- Petlibro Automatic Cat and Dog Feeder (feeding, ASIN B09GCMJXDB)
- Tractive GPS Dog Tracker (safety, ASIN B0B88XG7V4)

## Key pages

- /: Homepage with product grid
- /products/{slug}: Individual product guide with problem, solution, honest note, and FAQs
- /about: Editorial mission and affiliate disclosure details
- /privacy: Privacy policy (contact: petgadgethub@protonmail.com)
- /tools/rental-resume: Free UK pet rental resume generator (Renters Rights Act 2025)

## Contact
